schema.description: Returned when a workspace write operation cannot proceed because another write operation currently holds the workspace lock.

lock.description: Metadata for an active workspace write lock. Present only while another write operation is holding the workspace lease.

lock_id.description: Unique identifier for the active workspace lock.

operation.description: Write operation that currently holds the workspace lock.

locked_by.description: User that acquired the workspace lock.

acquired_at.description: Timestamp at which the workspace lock was acquired.

expires_at.description: Timestamp at which the workspace lock expires if it is not released first.

lock.title: WorkspaceLock

schema.title: WorkspaceLockConflictResponseContent
